M

main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 mypakege.Date
Testbed main() for unit testing Date.isValid() as required by the project.
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 mypakege.Profile
Testbed main() for Profile.compareTo().
main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 mypakege.RunProject1
 
major - 类中的变量 mypakege.Student
 
Major - mypakege中的枚举类
Represents the supported student majors and the school each major belongs to.
Major(String) - 枚举类的构造器 mypakege.Major
Constructs a Major enum constant with its school name.
majorOnly - 枚举类中的变量 mypakege.Course
 
MATH - 枚举类 中的枚举常量 mypakege.Major
 
meets(Standing) - 枚举类中的方法 mypakege.Standing
Checks whether this standing meets (is at least) a required standing.
minStanding - 枚举类中的变量 mypakege.Course
 
month - 类中的变量 mypakege.Date
